name: Stash the journal at the old sawmill
Locate the heavily mined area on Woods

imgs.name: The sandbags that block the path to the mines
imgs.desc:
The heavily mined area refers to the west and north-west approaches to the "USEC camp" which is located in the northwest of the location.
 
The safest way fulfill the objective is, to get inside the camp from the north, east or south and walk up to the sandbags between the big rocks in the west of the camp that block off a path to the mines.

name: The missing courier crew location
desc: In this quest you have to locate Ragman's missing courier on Woods. He can be found next to his burnt-out car at the gate between the big junction and the sawmill. Walk through the gate to complete the objective.

name: Scout the Office
AK-50 handguard location
desc: The handguard can be found inside a barn at the old sawmill in the east of Woods. There are multiple spawns throughout the barn. The handguard is required for the quest Hobby Club.

name: Locate the the crashed plane on Woods
Retrieve the plane's flight recorder on Woods
desc: The flight recorder can be found under the broken fuselage of the plane, on the starboard side in woods (the side facing north on your compass).

name: The armored case
desc: The case is on Woods in the crashed Plane, in the front of the cockpit, on the left side.
